_notes.@actions/core: Provides core APIs for inputs, outputs, logging, and failures in GitHub Actions.
_notes.@actions/exec: Runs shell commands from the action code.
_notes.@actions/github: Provides GitHub context and API helpers (Octokit).
_notes.versioning: Exact versions (1.10.1, 1.1.1) are pinned; ^9.0.0 allows minor/patch updates within major version 9.
